title: Steamed Salad with Olive Dressing
description: A simple salad made with steamed greens and a homemade olive dressing. This dish is perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Prepare the steamed salad by tossing the greens with a pinch of salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, sliced olives, and lemon juice to make the dressing.
Toss the steamed salad with the olive dressing until the greens are evenly coated.
Serve the salad immediately, garnished with additional olives if desired.
